  • Uses of MessageFilterI.TimeFilterI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages.filters

    Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages.filters that implement MessageFilterI.TimeFilterI
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AcceptAllTimeFilter
    Implémentation de MessageFilterI.TimeFilterI (joker temporel) acceptant toute estampille, y compris null.
    class 
    AfterOrAtTimeFilter
    Implémentation de MessageFilterI.TimeFilterI acceptant les estampilles t telles que t >= lowerBoundInclusive.
    class 
    BeforeOrAtTimeFilter
    Implémentation de MessageFilterI.TimeFilterI acceptant les estampilles t telles que t <= upperBoundInclusive.
    class 
    BetweenTimeFilter
    Implémentation de MessageFilterI.TimeFilterI acceptant les estampilles t telles que startInclusive <= t <= endInclusive.
